learn.title: Learn
learn.text: 39 interactive modules ordered by conservatory curriculum — from notes to advanced composition.

compose.title: Compose
compose.text: Write music on a real staff with our built-in notation engine. Drag, click, and hear your creation.

levelup.title: Level Up
levelup.text: Earn XP, stars, and badges as you progress. Unlock new modules and climb the ranks to Virtuoso.

modules.title: Curriculum
modules.subtitle: Your path from novice to virtuoso

footer.text: Opus Ludus — Learn composition through play.
